description:
Evaluate the WASP-12b time-series dataset (186 calibrated FITS frames in ~/AstroImages/wasp12b_qc/raw/) for observation quality. Import the frames as a virtual stack in AstroImageJ, select a bright reference star, and run Multi-Aperture photometry to track its FWHM and Sky/Pixel across all frames. Identify the 3 worst frames for seeing (highest FWHM) and the 3 worst frames for sky background (highest Sky/Pixel). Save your findings to ~/AstroImages/wasp12b_qc/qc_report.txt using the exact format:

Worst Seeing Frames:
1. [Frame number]
2. [Frame number]
3. [Frame number]

Highest Sky Background Frames:
1. [Frame number]
2. [Frame number]
3. [Frame number]

Note: Frame numbers should be the slice indices (1 to 186).
